title: HTI Stretchy Crazy Carrot
features: Great toy to reduce tension, and relieve stress
description: SQUEEZE AND STRETCHABLE ANTI-STRESS Carrot! Get a Super Cool Anti-Stress Carrot that you can squeeze and stretch out in different shapes and figures when you feel stressed or you feel the restlessness comes crawling and you do not know what to do of your hands. Then it may be nice to squeeze away the stress with thisincrdible cool squeezable and stretchable Poop to help you keep calm and comfortable.Or why not make fun and set up some pranks for your family and friends and make them laugh with you.Appropriate for the TV couch when movies are the most exciting or frustreted then it may be nice to let go of the frustration or tension on this Squeezy Product.The Poop consists of a smooth and super soft silicone cover that is filled with powder that allows you to create the most laughable forms and shaped. 1PC.Squeeze And Stretchable Crazy Carrot!. Color: Orange. Dimensions: approx.17 x 4 x 5 cm. NOTE !!NOT APPLICABLE TO CHILDREN UNDER 5 YEARS ON BASIS OF SMALL PARTS AND CHOKING HAZARD!!
